decisions.decision: CLIProxy as Priority 1, Gemini SDK as fallback
decisions.reason: CLIProxy provides free multi-model access (GPT, Claude, Gemini) via self-hosted proxy

decisions.decision: Brain v2 split files (project/domain/knowledge/features/session)
decisions.reason: Legacy brain.json 40KB too large — split for faster reads and safer edits

decisions.decision: Two-step speaker notes (raw → optimized)
decisions.reason: Raw generation then QA/TTS optimization produces better audio quality

decisions.decision: syncSpeakerNotesToSlideAudios updates existing records, NOT delete+recreate
decisions.reason: Deleting SlideAudio records would lose existing audio files

decisions.decision: refreshLessonDataOnly() separate from refreshLessonData()
decisions.reason: fetchLessonData overwrites currentStep from backend state. Must preserve client-side step when navigating

decisions.decision: CLIProxy model discovery includes ALL models by default
decisions.reason: Users should see all available models. Classification done via name pattern matching

decisions.decision: Support 4 response formats in CLIProxy TTS parser
decisions.reason: CLIProxy returns audio in non-standard format — future-proofing

decisions.decision: Always override fallback model to hardcoded 'gemini-2.5-flash-preview-tts'
decisions.reason: CLIProxy display name is invalid for Gemini SDK

decisions.decision: VietNormalizer DISABLED in v1.1.1
decisions.reason: Causes audio quality degradation (mispronounced words). TTS optimization handled by AI prompt instead

decisions.decision: Nginx timeout set to 600s
decisions.reason: AI generation (questions, speaker notes) can take 2-5 minutes. 180s was too short, causing false-negative errors on VPS.

decisions.decision: SVG favicon instead of PNG
decisions.reason: Scalable, crisp at all sizes, no generation dependency

decisions.decision: Use file-based debug logging for TTS debugging
decisions.reason: Terminal logs could not be read via tools — file-based logging effective for remote debugging

decisions.decision: ViTTS OmniVoice: default mode = 'auto' (not 'clone')
decisions.reason: Clone requires UUID ref_id. 'auto' is safe fallback that needs no extra params

decisions.decision: ViTTS OmniVoice async polling with 3-min timeout
decisions.reason: POST returns job_id → poll GET /jobs/{id} until completed/failed. 3 min covers long audio generation

decisions.decision: Voice Design instruct: exact comma-separated items only
decisions.reason: API rejects 'A female, young speaker'. Must use exact items: 'female, young adult, high pitch'

decisions.decision: Translate Vietnamese Visual Idea to English specific Flux prompt
decisions.reason: Flux/ComfyUI prompts require specific structure. Vietnamese causes hallucinated results. Done in optimizeFluxPrompt().

decisions.decision: Multilingual system via Prompt Composer injection
decisions.reason: Using a single `{output_language_instruction}` placeholder in ALL system prompts instead of duplicating DB seeds per language.

decisions.decision: Removed TTS Dictionary and TextNormalizerService completely
decisions.reason: Functionality is natively handled by external TTS providers. Eliminates unneeded overhead and 17K DB records.

decisions.decision: Rewrite ALL system prompts from Vietnamese to English
decisions.reason: English prompts produce higher quality AI output. Language control via injected {output_language_instruction} placeholder ensures correct output language regardless of prompt language.

decisions.decision: ImageGen URL rewrite pattern (localhost → configured API host)
decisions.reason: Remote ImageGen APIs commonly return localhost URLs. Transparent URL rewriting more robust than requiring server-side config changes.

decisions.decision: SDK fallback always uses GEMINI_IMAGE_MODEL constant for ImageGen models
decisions.reason: ImageGen model names (flux-image) don't exist in Gemini SDK. isImageGenModel flag must force correct fallback model.

decisions.decision: Speaker notes 'PLAIN TEXT ONLY' TTS rule + 'Act as professional lecturer' persona
decisions.reason: Combining user's reference prompt style (natural presenter tone, no markdown) with existing quality requirements produces better TTS-ready output.

decisions.decision: Rewrite _add_audio_with_autoplay using direct XML/Part instead of add_movie()
decisions.reason: python-pptx 1.0.2 add_movie() throws 'Part has no attribute sha1' for WAV/MP3 audio. Direct XML manipulation with Part+PackURI+relationship bypasses this limitation.

decisions.decision: ViTTS base URL 8888 (not 8000)
decisions.reason: Port 8000 is used by ImageGen/Flux API. ViTTS OmniVoice production server runs on port 8888.

patterns: Prisma for type-safe database access with pg adapter
React Context for lesson editor state (+ TanStack Query for server state)
PromptComposer: Role (system.role + Subject) + Task (from DB slug) + {output_language_instruction}
seedV2() in prompts.service.ts keeps DB and code in sync — auto-seed on startup
Dynamic model discovery with API classification (GEMINI, CLIPROXY, IMAGE_GEN)
refreshLessonDataOnly() pattern — refresh data without overwriting step state
OmniVoice async job polling pattern: POST → job_id → poll → download audio_url
ViTTS mode detection from saved modelName: vitts:ref:UUID → clone, vitts:design → design, else → auto
ImageGen URL rewrite: detect localhost in response URL → replace origin with config URL
PPTX audio injection via XML: Part+PackURI+audioFile XML element + relationship (bypasses broken add_movie)
gotchas: ⭐ Image model name: 'gemini-2.5-flash-image' NOT 'gemini-2.5-flash-preview-image-generation' (404 error)
⭐ Image SDK: Use @google/genai (new) NOT @google/generative-ai (legacy)
⭐ Image generation: Use client.models.generateContentStream() with config.responseModalities=['IMAGE','TEXT']
⭐ Browser tags cannot send JWT headers — use public route /files/public/... for images
⭐ Vite proxy: Add '/files' proxy to forward static file requests to backend port 3001
⭐ GEMINI_API_KEY must be in .env for image generation fallback when user has no key in DB
⭐ buildFullPrompt for ALL prompts that need language injection (speaker-notes, optimize-notes, slides.design, questions)
⭐ Always sync prompts.service.ts seedV2() when updating prompts in DB
⭐ ExcelJS import: Use 'import * as ExcelJS from exceljs' (static), NOT 'await import()'
⭐ Template background paths: URLs like /files/public/system/templates/{uuid}/... map to datauser/system/templates/{uuid}/...
⭐ ViTTS voice ID normalization: Strip 'vitts:' prefix before sending to API
⭐ ViTTS synthesize-with-saved-ref endpoint: Use form-urlencoded (URLSearchParams), NOT JSON body
⭐ CLIProxy TTS modalities: Must use UPPERCASE 'AUDIO' — lowercase causes 400 error
⭐ CLIProxy TTS response format: Audio in message.images[].image_url.url as data URI, NOT message.audio.data
⭐ CLIProxy TTS model name: Strip 'cliproxy:' prefix before API call
⭐ CLIProxy TTS fallback: Override dto.model to 'gemini-2.5-flash-preview-tts' for Gemini SDK
⭐ refreshLessonData() overwrites currentStep — use refreshLessonDataOnly() to avoid navigation regression
⭐ Speaker notes in 3 places: Lesson.slideScript, Slide table, SlideAudio table — must sync all 3
⭐ AI-generated outline JSON wrapped in ```json...``` markdown — must strip before JSON.parse
⭐ Optimize prompt pitfall: 'viết lại' causes AI to compress narrative→bullet lists (30-56% content loss). Use >=95% word count constraint
⭐ Admin model discovery: Do NOT use process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY — key is in DB (api_keys table). Use ApiKeysService.getActiveKey()
🐳 Prisma 7 Docker: Requires Node 22+, OpenSSL on Alpine, binaryTargets: ['native', 'linux-musl-openssl-3.0.x']
🐳 Prisma 7 Docker: Remove 'url' from schema.prisma datasource — must use prisma.config.ts
🐳 Prisma Migration: Dockerfile CMD must run 'npx prisma migrate deploy' BEFORE 'node dist/src/main'
🐳 Vite production: VITE_API_URL baked at BUILD time — use nginx proxy /api/ for runtime flexibility
🐳 Docker Compose: ports: '3001:3001' REQUIRED to expose backend
🚀 GHCR login: echo 'PAT_TOKEN' | docker login ghcr.io -u username --password-stdin
JWT expiresIn must be number (seconds)
Prisma 7: REQUIRES @prisma/adapter-pg + pg driver — no direct connection
JwtStrategy.validate() returns {id, email, role} — use user.id NOT user.userId
Frontend default API_URL port 3000 — need VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3001
CSS class conflict: UserSettings.css .modal-content {max-width:420px} overrides AdminPage — use specific class with !important
Nginx default proxy_read_timeout is 60s — AI requests need 600s (not 180s — questions/speaker notes can take 2-5 min)
⭐ OmniVoice generate-clone-ref: MUST use application/x-www-form-urlencoded (URLSearchParams), NOT JSON.
⭐ OmniVoice Voice Design instruct format: 'female, young adult, high pitch' — NOT 'A female, young speaker'.
⭐ ViTTS vittsMode detection: saved modelName 'vitts:auto' — ALWAYS default to 'auto' mode, not 'clone'.
⭐ Flux/ComfyUI Image Gen uses OpenAI-compatible endpoint but only returns `{data: [{b64_json: '...'}]}`.
⭐ Prompt Composer: {output_language_instruction} placeholder injected at runtime — English prompts + dynamic language = correct output.
⭐ ComfyUI API Crash: size `256x256` or steps `4` specifically crashes Flux.dev.
🆕 ImageGen URL rewrite: Remote Flux API returns http://localhost:8000/image/xxx.png — backend rewrites to configured host (e.g. http://117.0.36.6:8000/image/xxx.png).
🆕 ModelSelector must include IMAGE_GEN category in discovery/merge/sort logic — otherwise Flux models invisible in dropdown.
🆕 Gemini SDK fallback: When isImageGenModel=true, MUST use GEMINI_IMAGE_MODEL constant — NOT the ImageGen model name (flux-image → 404).
🆕 regenerateSlideContent: Must use 'slides.design' slug — 'slides.optimize_content' does NOT exist.
🆕 Speaker notes prompts: MUST include 'PLAIN TEXT ONLY' rule — TTS engines cannot read Markdown, bullets, emojis.
🆕 GeminiService.optimizeFluxPrompt() uses process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY directly (not DB key). If key invalid, falls back to original prompt (non-critical warning).
⭐⭐ python-pptx 1.0.2 add_movie() BROKEN for audio: 'Part object has no attribute sha1'. Must use direct Part+PackURI+XML to inject audio.
⭐ PPTX audio injection: audio frame uses a:audioFile (not a:videoFile). Must create TWO relationships: officeDocument/audio + microsoft/media.
⭐ ViTTS production: baseUrl must use port 8888. Port 8000 is Flux/ImageGen.
⭐ ViTTS omniCloneRef: Use FormData directly, NOT stringified body. Hardcoded local paths (f:/...) crash on Linux VPS.
⭐ VPS false-negative errors: Backend completes but frontend shows error due to nginx proxy_read_timeout being too short. Set to 600s minimum.
conventions: Prisma map() for snake_case in DB
Frontend pages in src/pages/, components in src/components/
Controller @CurrentUser() returns { id: string }, not userId
Use refreshLessonDataOnly() when navigating between steps
ALL system prompts written in English with {output_language_instruction} for dynamic language control
